title: Bedrock Keyboard & Mouse Tooltips for Legacy4J (1080p)
description: Changes Legacy4j Keyboard Tooltips to Bedrock
body:
## ⚠️!!WARNING!!⚠️
This only WORKS on 1080p displays!
## Information
This changes Legacy4J keyboard and mouse tooltips into more like Minecraft: Bedrock Edition.
## Required
This requires [Legacy4J](https://modrinth.com/mod/legacy4j). You can also use modpacks that has these mods, such as:
- [Re-Console](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-minecraft) by Nostalgica Reverie
- [William's Console: Revisited](https://modrinth.com/modpack/williams-console-revisited) by Nostalgica Reverie
- [Legacy Remade (Discontinued)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-remade) made by Legacy Projects
- [Legacy Reborn (Discontinued)](https://modrinth.com/modpack/legacy-reborn) made by Legacy Projects, and many more.
